title: MA DDS FY25 Year-in-Review Case-Processing Stats (presentation slide screenshot)
description: Screenshot of a MassAbility (Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission / MA DDS) FY25 Year-in-Review presentation slide titled 'FY 25 Year In Review - Case Processing'. The slide reports that MA DDS processed a total workload of 71,316 cases in FY2025, broken down as: 48,030 Initial Claims; 10,800 Reconsideration Claims; 9,500 Continuing Disability Reviews; 885 Pre-Hearing Claims; and 422 Disability Hearings. The frame is a recorded webinar/video view (a PDF/media-viewer toolbar is visible top-left and a presenter silhouette appears at the right); the MassAbility logo is in the lower-right corner.

source.publisher: MassAbility (Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission) / Massachusetts Disability Determination Services (MA DDS)
source.title: FY 25 Year In Review - Case Processing (presentation slide)

notes: Transcribed numbers from the slide image: total workload 71,316 cases; 48,030 Initial Claims; 10,800 Reconsideration Claims; 9,500 Continuing Disability Reviews; 885 Pre-Hearing Claims; 422 Disability Hearings. Tier=Authoritative because this is a direct screenshot of an official MassAbility/MA DDS FY25 presentation; however the figures were re-keyed by reading the image, so transcription error is possible and values should be reconciled against the source presentation or the MassAbility FY25 annual report before authoritative use. Approximate capture year 2025 (from filename); 'FY 25' = state fiscal year 2025 (Jul 2024-Jun 2025). The exact source URL/deep link is not visible in the screenshot; publisher inferred from the MassAbility logo and slide content.
